Savings Provision, (3), , , provided that:Pub. L. 110–417, div. B, title XXVIII, § 2812(e)(2)122 Stat. 4727Oct. 14, 2008“(2).—Effect on existing contractsThe repeal of , United States Code, shall not affect the validity or terms of any lease with respect to property of a Defense Agency entered into by the Secretary of Defense under such section before the date of the enactment of this Act [].section 2667a of title 10Oct. 14, 2008“(3).—Treatment of money rentsAmounts in any special account established for a Defense Agency pursuant to subsection (d) of , United States Code, before repeal of such section by paragraph (1), and amounts that would be deposited in such an account in connection with a lease referred to in paragraph (2), shall—section 2667a of title 10“(A)remain available until expended for the purposes specified in such subsection, notwithstanding the repeal of such section by paragraph (1); or“(B)to the extent provided in appropriations Acts, be transferred to the special account required for the Secretary of Defense by subsection (e) of section 2667 of such title, as amended by subsection (d)(2) of this section.”
